name: coin-burst-reward-feedback
description: Verify a broken depth block emits a bounded local coin burst that flies toward the hero and records reward audio feedback.

args.code: local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation a:Invoke('Reset') a:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=99}) local r=a:Invoke('BreakDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=2},3) local b=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02') task.wait(.12) local broken=b and b:GetAttribute('Broken')==true return game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONEncode({ok=r.ok==true and broken,coins=r.Coins,broken=broken,target=b and b.Name or ''})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local deadline=os.clock()+3 repeat task.wait(.05) until os.clock()>=deadline or (g:GetAttribute('LastCoinBurstCount') or 0)>0 local f=workspace:FindFirstChild('Local Coin Rewards') local count=f and #f:GetChildren() or 0 return H:JSONEncode({ok=(g:GetAttribute('LastCoinBurstCount') or 0)>0 and (g:GetAttribute('LastCoinBurstCount') or 0)<=7 and (g:GetAttribute('CoinBurstTotal') or 0)>0 and count<=30,last=g:GetAttribute('LastCoinBurstCount') or 0,total=g:GetAttribute('CoinBurstTotal') or 0,live=count})
local f=workspace:FindFirstChild('Local Coin Rewards') return tostring(f and #f:GetChildren() or 0)
